summary: A fixed-camera clip of Vice President Vance speaking at a podium in Bangor, Maine about fighting fraud and protecting taxpayers, in front of a crowd holding 'PROTECTING TAXPAYER DOLLARS' signs. The frames are a static podium shot and the audio is a continuous speech. It is a raw/lightly-edited speech with no music or genre styling, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: PROTECTING TAXPAYER DOLLARS; tweet quote: 'it is time to have leadership in Washington that treats you the right way, and protects those hard-earned tax dollars.'
